view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'No permanent event type clutter' is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'No permanent event type clutter' is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system generates a temporary link for a one-off meeting, which aligns with the requirement of avoiding permanent event types. The scenario explicitly states that the link expires after the meeting, confirming that no permanent event type is created. This is directly supported by the evidence in the linked use case, which outlines the functionality of the temporary booking system.
